data.title: CME Group Reaches All-Time Record Monthly and Quarterly Average Daily Volume
data.description: In March, there was a record monthly Average Daily Volume (ADV) of 41.1 million contracts traded. For the first quarter (Q1), there was also a record quarterly ADV of 36.2 million contracts. This high trading activity was seen across various sectors including interest rates, energy, metals, equity index, agriculture, and foreign exchange products. Additionally, a record quarterly ADV was noted in U.S. Treasury and SOFR complexes. The trading hub was in Chicago.

data.title: CTIM-76 by Context Therapeutics granted FDA Fast Track for Platinum-Resistant Ovarian Cancer treatment.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, showcasing a significant improvement from the previous month. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, demonstrating growth and stability. The government officials have lauded these numbers as a positive sign for the country's economic progress. However, concerns have been raised regarding the wage growth, which remained stagnant at 2% despite the increase in employment opportunities. Experts suggest that addressing this issue is crucial to ensuring the well-being of the workforce and sustaining economic development.

data.title: PayNearMe Boosts Self-Service Adoption and Payment Completion with New PayXM™ Capabilities
data.description: PayNearMe, a fintech company based in Santa Clara, California, has introduced new features that aim to revitalize forgotten payment processes. Within this update, it was observed that following the receipt of a re-engagement message, 50% of payers choose to come back to the payment flow. Out of this returning group, 7% successfully finalize their payment. This conversion rate is notably higher when compared to the standard rate seen in e-commerce transactions.

data.title: Positive Clinical Results from HyBryte™ Comparative Study Evaluating HyBryte™ Against Valchlor® in the Treatment of Cutaneous T-Cell Lymphoma Published in Oncology and Therapy
data.description: HyBryte™ has shown a faster and more effective treatment response in comparison to Valchlor® over a 12-week treatment period. This recent demonstration took place in Princeton, N.J. on April 2, 2026. Soligenix, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNGX), a biopharmaceutical company in its late stages, is behind this development. Their focus is on advancing innovative therapies in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Annovis Secures U.S. Patent for Buntanetap in the Prevention and Treatment of Neurological Injuries Caused by Brain Infections
data.description: Annovis Bio, Inc., a Phase 3 clinical-stage biotechnology company traded on NYSE under the symbol ANVS, based in Malvern, Pennsylvania, disclosed the acquisition of U.S. Patent No. 12,582,632 B2 on April 2, 2026. The patent safeguards the method of preventing and treating neurological damages from brain infections by using buntanetap or similar substances. Annovis focuses on developing an oral therapy for neurodegenerative ailments like Alzheimer's disease (AD) and Parkinson's disease (PD).

data.title: V2X Names Mike Uster Chief Information Officer to Advance Enterprise Technology Strategy
data.description: In Reston, Virginia on April 2, 2026, V2X, Inc. (NYSE: VVX) revealed the selection of Mike Uster as the new Chief Information Officer. Uster's appointment is effective immediately. He will be responsible for steering the company's worldwide information technology strategy, overseeing enterprise systems, and developing digital initiatives.

data.title: PanGIA Biotech Announces Peer-Reviewed Study in Diagnostics Showing 97.8% Sensitivity in Detecting Prostate Cancer Using a Urine-Based Liquid Biopsy with Machine Learning
data.description: On April 2, 2026, in Delray Beach, Florida, PanGIA Biotech, Inc. unveiled significant findings from a peer-reviewed clinical study titled "Urine-Based Machine Learning Assay Detects Prostate Cancer" published in Diagnostics. The study showcased the clinical efficacy of PanGIA Analysis System (PAS) in detecting prostate cancer with remarkable accuracy. The research underscores the potential of PAS to revolutionize prostate cancer diagnosis and treatment.

data.title: Coinbase's Chief Legal Officer says clarity on stablecoin yield deal is imminent, despite concerns about deposit flight.
data.description: The chief legal officer of a major cryptocurrency exchange refuted worries from the banking sector regarding the potential flight of deposits. This comes as legislators are in the process of finalizing regulations related to stablecoins. The exchange's lawyer addressed these concerns, emphasizing the need for regulatory clarity and highlighting the importance of stablecoin provisions in the evolving financial landscape.

data.title: Carolinas AGC Announces Inaugural Excellence in Human Resources Leadership Awards
data.description: The inaugural Excellence in Human Resources Leadership Award Winners have been announced by Carolinas AGC (CAGC) in Charlotte, N.C., on April 2, 2026. This award recognizes CAGC members who have shown outstanding leadership in Human Resources. The winners have been selected based on their exemplary contributions to the field. This initiative aims to celebrate and honor the achievements of individuals in the Human Resources sector.

data.title: Health Coach Institute Launches Functional Nutrition Professional Certification to Elevate Standards in Wellness Education
data.description: A recently accredited program by AADP has been introduced to Phoenix, aiming to enhance structured assessment, systems-based reasoning, and scope clarity in nutrition training. With chronic diseases currently responsible for 90% of the nation's annual healthcare spending amounting to $4.1 trillion, there is a growing need for such initiatives.

data.title: Engrain and Venn Close the Longest Open Loop in Leasing: Data Loss from Search to Application
data.description: Engrain, a top provider of map-based data visualization for rental housing, recently announced a new integration that links SightMap® data with Venn's leasing, screening, and move-in processes. This integration aims to tackle the issue of data loss that has been causing operators missed conversion opportunities for more than ten years. Set in motion on April 2, 2026, in Denver, this initiative is poised to significantly enhance the overall efficiency and effectiveness of operations in the rental housing sector.

data.title: Mill Creek Announces New Retail Tenants at Modera Riverview
data.description: Indaco, a popular Italian restaurant, is set to become a part of LEGACY, a mixed-use community in Nashville, Tennessee. This announcement was made by Mill Creek Residential on April 2, 2026. Mill Creek Residential is known for its expertise in developing, owning, and managing rental properties in the United States. This addition of Indaco is part of the expansion that will bring two new retailers into the community.

data.title: Phemex Publishes April 2026 Proof of Reserves, Reporting 131% Total Reserve Ratio
data.description: In Apia, Samoa on April 2, 2026, Phemex, a crypto exchange prioritizing user experience, unveiled its April 2026 Proof of Reserves (PoR). This release emphasizes Phemex's dedication to transparency, asset support, and safeguarding user funds. The report affirms that all user balances are entirely....
